updates.tweet_text:
Finally another vol expansion in #ES_F. Overnight traders gifted a low quality Failed Breakdown. Failed Breakdown of 7392 was trigger given in newsletter. 240am we recovered, ran +22,sold

Plan today: 7392 must reclaim to see 7398, 7407, 7421+. Bears control<21. 72, 52, 38 below https://t.co/xLXPahQry8
updates.notes: 7407 appears new but is likely rounding of morning-plan 7410; all other prices (7392,7398,7421,7372,7352,7338) are reaffirmations of published morning levels.

updates.tweet_text: @schwartzaman Its definitely a significant low, but I'd expect lower win rate Failed Breakdowns down there since we've broken structure at 7421. This is fine though, I'm only looking for 5 points a day usually so anymore is bonus
updates.notes: Conversational reply referencing existing morning plan level 7421; no new actionable price named with naming language.

updates.tweet_text: @hcooper0113 There was no Failed Breakdown at 7372. Remember a Failed Breakdown requires a significant low. There is nothing of the sort at 72. Its just a support, in a bearish context (where almost all supports fail by definition)
updates.notes: Reply explaining FBD criteria at 7372 (morning plan level); no new actionable price named, purely educational/contextual commentary.

updates.tweet_text: @Mcloud4004 @StephenJ223624 They're fine trades just need to prepared to get in and out quickly. Often goes a level or two and fails and does this several times before a big recovery
updates.notes: Purely conversational trading advice about managing quick trades; no specific price levels named or actionable triggers identified.

updates.tweet_text: Note: 7383 is also support. Bears remain in full control, but things could unravel below 83
updates.notes: 7383 explicitly named as support for first time — not in morning plan. 'Things could unravel below 83' adds actionable bear trigger context.

updates.tweet_text: @StephenJ223624 @Mcloud4004 I always get in later and higher but I am win rate focused not R/R focused. Sometimes it means I am getting in 10 or 15 points above the entry trigger if price is really ripping, but that is fine for me. I want to see momentum and conviction
updates.notes: Reply explaining personal trading style/methodology; no specific price levels named, no actionable triggers or supports/resistances mentioned.
